name: accessibility_describe
description:
An accessibility-focused image analysis node that generates scene descriptions 
optimized for blind and visually impaired users.

name: anonymize_text
description:
A filter component that 
identifies and masks sensitive information in text data.

name: astra_db
description:
A vector database component for Astra DB, enabling efficient storage and 
retrieval of vector embeddings.

name: audio_player
description:
The Audio Player component plays audio through the system’s default audio
output device, including the audio track from video content.

name: audio_transcribe
description: The Audio transcribe component recieves audio or video and transcribes into text.

name: audio_tts
description: Converts incoming text into speech using Kokoro-82M (local KPipeline or --modelserver KokoroLoader).

name: chat
description: A user interface component that provides a web-based chat experience.

name: chroma
description:
A vector database component for Chroma, enabling efficient storage and 
retrieval of vector embeddings.

name: db_clickhouse
description:
A ClickHouse component that answers natural-language questions by translating 
them into SQL and executing them against the database, returning rows as a table, 
text, or structured answers.

llm.description: LLM to use to craft SQL queries from question

name: db_mysql
description:
A processing component that takes structured table data and inserts it 
into a MySQL database.

llm.description: LLM to use to craft SQL queries from question

name: db_neo4j
description: A processing component that connects to a Neo4J graph database.

llm.description: LLM to use to craft Cypher queries from question

name: db_postgres
description:
A processing component that takes structured table data and inserts it 
into a PostgreSQL database.

llm.description: LLM to use to craft SQL queries from question

name: db_supabase
description:
A processing component that takes structured table data and inserts it 
into a Supabase (PostgreSQL) database.

llm.description: LLM to use to craft SQL queries from question

name: dictionary
description:
A processing component that analyzes documents to extract a dictionary of 
key terms and phrases.

llm.description: LLM to use for Dictionary creation

name: dropper
description: A user interface component that provides a web-based dropper experience.

name: elasticsearch
description:
A vector database component for Elasticsearch, enabling efficient storage and 
retrieval of vector embeddings.

name: embedding_image
description:
A processing component that generates vector embeddings from image content 
using advanced computer vision models.

name: embedding_openai
description:
A component that transforms text into numerical vector representations using advanced embedding 
models.

name: embedding_transformer
description:
A component that transforms text into numerical vector representations using advanced embedding 
models.

name: embedding_video
description:
A processing component that generates vector embeddings from video content 
by extracting frames at configurable intervals and encoding them using 
vision models such as CLIP.

name: extract_data
description:
A component that processes unstructured or semi-structured text and extracts 
structured data in a tabular format.

llm.description: LLM to use for data extraction

name: filesys
description: A source component that reads data from the local file system.

name: frame_grabber
description: A component that extracts frames from video files and outputs them as image data.

name: guardrails
description: A comprehensive input/output guardrails filter for AI safety.

name: hash
description:
A processing component that generates a unique fingerprint (hash) of a 
document's content.

name: image_cleanup
description:
A component that processes an image, cleans it up for OCR tasks by converting to
gray scale, removing noise, deskewing, and enhancing contrast.

name: image_vision_gemini
description:
A component that connects to Google Gemini's vision-capable models for image analysis, 
OCR, visual understanding, and scene description.

name: image_vision_mistral
description:
A component that connects to Mistral AI's vision-capable models for image analysis, 
OCR, and visual understanding tasks.

name: image_vision_ollama
description:
A component that connects to locally-hosted open-source vision models through Ollama 
for image analysis, description, and visual understanding tasks.

name: image_vision_openai
description:
A component that connects to OpenAI's vision-capable models for image analysis, 
OCR, visual understanding, and scene description.

name: llamaparse
llm_anthropic
description:
A component that integrates with Anthropic's Claude models for natural 
language understanding and generation.

name: llm_bedrock
description:
A component that connects to Amazon Bedrock, providing access to a range 
of foundation models from leading AI providers through a unified AWS interface.

name: llm_deepseek
description:
A component that connects to DeepSeek’s large language models for advanced 
natural language processing.

name: llm_gemini
description:
A component that connects to Gemini models for advanced natural language 
processing.

name: llm_gmi_cloud
description:
A component that connects to GMI Cloud's large language models for advanced 
natural language processing.

name: llm_minimax
description:
A component that connects to MiniMax's large language models for advanced 
natural language processing.

name: llm_mistral
description: A component that connects to Mistral AI's advanced language models for natural language processing.

name: llm_nebius
description: Connects to Nebius Token Factory's OpenAI-compatible inference API.

name: llm_ollama
description: A component that integrates with locally-hosted language models through Ollama.

name: llm_openai
description:
A component that connects to OpenAI's latest GPT models for advanced natural language 
processing.

name: llm_openai_api
description:
A component that connects to any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for language model 
inference.

name: llm_perplexity
description:
A component that connects to Perplexity AI's Sonar models for advanced natural language 
processing with real-time web search capabilities.

name: llm_qwen
description:
A component that connects to Alibaba Cloud's Qwen large language models via the 
DashScope API.

name: llm_xai
description:
A component that integrates with xAI's Grok language models for intelligent text generation 
and analysis.

name: local-text-output
description: A target component that writes data to the file system.

name: mcp_client
description: Connects to an external MCP server and exposes its tools for agent tool-calling.

name: memory_internal
description: Run-scoped keyed memory store exposed as agent tools.

name: memory_persistent
description:
A persistent cross-session memory node that retains data across pipeline
invocations.

name: milvus
description:
A vector database component for Milvus, enabling efficient storage, indexing, 
and retrieval of vector embeddings.

name: mongodb+srv
description:
A vector database component for MongoDB Atlas, enabling efficient storage and 
retrieval of vector embeddings using MongoDB's native vector search capabilities.

name: ner
description:
A text processing component that identifies and extracts named entities from text using 
state-of-the-art transformer models.

name: ocr
description:
A component that extracts machine-readable text from images and scanned documents 
using optical character recognition.

name: opensearch
description:
An OpenSearch node that supports classic BM25 search and vector search 
for ingestion and retrieval workflows.

name: parse
description:
A document parsing component that extracts rich content from a wide variety 
of document types.

name: pinecone
description:
A component that connects to the Pinecone vector database for storing and retrieving 
high-dimensional embeddings.

name: postgres
description:
A component that enhances PostgreSQL with vector similarity search 
capabilities through the pgvector extension.

name: preprocessor_code
description: A specialized component designed to parse and tokenize source code.

name: preprocessor_langchain
description:
A preprocessing component that segments large bodies of text into intelligently sized 
chunks for downstream processing.

name: preprocessor_llm
description:
A processing component that analyzes document content to extract concise 
summaries, key points, and named entities and to divide a document for 
storage into a vector database.

llm.description: LLM to use to process the document

name: prompt
description:
A transformation component that takes multiple inputs and merges them 
into a single question with a configurable prompt.

name: qdrant
description:
A vector database component for Qdrant, enabling efficient storage and 
retrieval of vector embeddings.

name: question
description:
A transformation component that takes input text and encapsulates 
it as a Question object without modification.

name: reducto
description:
A parsing component that uses Reducto to extract text and structured data 
from various document formats including PDFs, images, and other document types.

name: remote
description:
A transport component that forwards data to a remote machine or 
processing node.

name: rerank_cohere
description:
A reranking component powered by Cohere's Rerank API that improves 
search quality by reordering retrieved documents based on their 
relevance to a given query.

name: response_answers
description: A component that returns processed answers back to the requesting client.

name: response_audio
description: A component that returns processed audio back to the requesting client.

name: response_documents
description: A component that returns processed documents back to the requesting client.

name: response_image
description: A component that returns processed images back to the requesting client.

name: response_questions
description: A component that returns processed questions back to the requesting client.

name: response_table
description: A component that returns processed tables back to the requesting client.

name: response_text
description: A component that returns processed text back to the requesting client.

name: response_video
description: A component that returns processed video back to the requesting client.

name: search_exa
description: A direct Exa web search node.

name: summarization
description:
A processing component that analyzes document content to extract concise 
summaries, key points, and named entities.

llm.description: LLM to use to summarize the document

name: telegram
description: A Telegram Bot source node that receives messages from users via the Telegram Bot API.

name: text-output
description: A target component that writes data to the file system.

name: thumbnail
description: A processing component that creates thumbnails from input images.

name: tool_bland_ai
description: Make and manage AI-powered phone calls via Bland AI.

name: tool_butterbase
description: Connects to the Butterbase MCP server and exposes its backend tools for agent tool-calling.

name: tool_chartjs
description: Generates Chart.

llm.description: LLM used to generate Chart.js configurations from data

name: tool_exa_search
description: Exposes Exa semantic web search as an agent tool.

name: tool_filesystem
description: File system tool for agents.

name: tool_firecrawl
description: Exposes Firecrawl web-scraping operations as agent tools.

name: tool_git
description: Exposes local Git repository operations as agent tools.

name: tool_github
description: Exposes GitHub repository operations as agent tools.

name: tool_http_request
description: Makes HTTP requests to any API endpoint — like curl for agents.

name: tool_pipe
description: Exposes an inline pipeline as an agent tool.

name: tool_python
description: Executes Python code in a restricted in-process sandbox via exec().

name: tool_tavily
description: Exposes Tavily real-time web search as an agent tool.

name: tool_xtrace_memory
description: Long-term, shared agent memory exposed as tools, backed by xTrace Memory Manager.

name: twelvelabs
description: Sends a video to TwelveLabs along with instructions and returns the generated text response.

name: weaviate
description:
A component that stores vector embeddings in a Weaviate instance 
for semantic search and retrieval.

name: webhook
description:
A source component that listens for incoming HTTP requests and accepts 
uploaded documents or data from external systems or processes.
